# Load the provided JSON files and search for the ayah containing the phrase.
import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, textwrap, os, sys, pandas as pd

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel, unify hamza/ya/ta marbuta forms for search
    s = re.sub("[\u0640]", "", s)  # tatweel
    # remove harakat
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # normalize forms
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    # remove punctuation-like marks
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

needle = "إن الذين يتلون كتاب الله وأقاموا الصلاة وأنفقوا مما رزقناهم سرا وعلانية يرجون تجارة لن تبور ليوفيهم أجورهم ويزيدهم من فضله إنه غفور شكور"
norm_needle = normalize(needle)

candidates = []
for rec in quran:
    ayah_text = rec.get("ayah_text","")
    if not ayah_text:
        continue
    if normalize(ayah_text).find("يتلون كتاب الله") != -1:
        candidates.append(rec)

len(candidates), candidates[:2]

# Build the combined canonical text exactly as in DB for 35:29-30
v29 = [r for r in quran if r["surah_id"]==35 and r["ayah_id"]==29][0]["ayah_text"]
v30 = [r for r in quran if r["surah_id"]==35 and r["ayah_id"]==30][0]["ayah_text"]
combined = v29 + " " + v30
combined

content.text: {"correction":"إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَأَقَامُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَأَنْفَقُوا مِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ سِرًّا وَعَلَانِيَةً يَرْجُونَ تِجَارَةً لَنْ تَبُورَ لِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أُجُورَهُمْ وَيَزِيدَهُمْ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ ۚ إِنَّهُ غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ"}
